body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, JANUARY 2, 2020
WHILE WARNOCK DUCKS ABUSE QUESTIONS, HARVEY WEINSTEIN'S "FIXER" GIVES HIM THOUSANDS ATLANTA, GA - It's been nearly two weeks since shocking bodycam footage exposed the domestic abuse allegations against Raphael Warnock. It's been nearly one week since a victim of child abuse at his summer camp came forward. And now -- while Warnock has avoided answering any questions about his disturbing past -- a new report shows that convicted rapist Harvey Weinstein's right-hand man has poured thousands into electing Warnock.
New reporting from [Inside Sources](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y3eY-o5FJy3TqIsctKighO-de1uk4T_16uokmOAnmR32GLllxlx1F_mcWlfmPFHi1kIjHKhQuUMHdlzGNIBY21Z2dYyzGvhV6EdbRI5A5YPvwoTvF_DWOnOVBj0bMydP0FMtuTDAxF_BHUf4z3s4DX8OSw13tb-1jAxn3qVVfrV4zMvvfz5uQKF1sY__UGbGdhNd4UgMFhpFFDjYXpdnCkIaEAORFDo_lnFjahtRQzaqcI31ZUYpPi8YsEGdBBt0&c=QY5zd_8rr1G34S4mJnx_-yjORFnV-veQ4kSU9NWIjeh_iqteoBX7gQ==&ch=6KbXzg5_arTVnV47qD5UxQ8uyfeY9ByweGkdCH8B_f5C7xXCwJNszg==) shows that David Boies, known as Weinstein's "fixer," donated and helped raise thousands to elect Raphael Warnock -- including a $10,000 donation from his law partner directly to the Ossoff-Warnock Victory Fund. These contributions were made immediately following news of Warnock's domestic and child abuse scandals.
"Not only is Raphael Warnock unable to answer questions about his involvement in domestic abuse and child abuse, he's now soliciting help from convicted rapist Harvey Weinstein's lawyer to bail him out," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "These donations prove there's no low Warnock won't go to hide his shady and disgusting past. Raphael Warnock's legal troubles are looming large, and his refusal to answer for these serious allegations shows he has no business being anywhere near the U.S. Senate." [Inside Sources: Harvey Weinstein 'Fixer' Boies Gave Thousands To Warnock in GA Senate Showdown](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y3eY-o5FJy3TqIsctKighO-de1uk4T_16uokmOAnmR32GLllxlx1F_mcWlfmPFHi1kIjHKhQuUMHdlzGNIBY21Z2dYyzGvhV6EdbRI5A5YPvwoTvF_DWOnOVBj0bMydP0FMtuTDAxF_BHUf4z3s4DX8OSw13tb-1jAxn3qVVfrV4zMvvfz5uQKF1sY__UGbGdhNd4UgMFhpFFDjYXpdnCkIaEAORFDo_lnFjahtRQzaqcI31ZUYpPi8YsEGdBBt0&c=QY5zd_8rr1G34S4mJnx_-yjORFnV-veQ4kSU9NWIjeh_iqteoBX7gQ==&ch=6KbXzg5_arTVnV47qD5UxQ8uyfeY9ByweGkdCH8B_f5C7xXCwJNszg==)
"Raphael Warnock has raised a stunning $125 million in his campaign to unseat Republican Senator Kelly Loeffler. Among his contributors is super lawyer David Boies, best known recently as convicted rapist Harvey Weinstein's "fixer." Boies hired a Mossad-linked private intelligence company called Black Cube to quash stories about Weinstein's assaults and to harass journalists who were trying to report on them. Boies contributed almost $6,000 to the Georgia Federal Elections Committee, which is focused on flipping the two Georgia U.S. Senate seats now held by Loeffler and David Perdue. Jonathan Schiller, Boies's partner in the law firm Boies Schiller & Flexner, also contributed $10,000 to the Osoff-Warnock Victory Fund. The contributions came just days after Warnock, a pastor, had to defend himself after police bodycam footage showing his then-wife telling police he purposefully ran over her foot with his car." [Read more.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y3eY-o5FJy3TqIsctKighO-de1uk4T_16uokmOAnmR32GLllxlx1F_mcWlfmPFHi1kIjHKhQuUMHdlzGNIBY21Z2dYyzGvhV6EdbRI5A5YPvwoTvF_DWOnOVBj0bMydP0FMtuTDAxF_BHUf4z3s4DX8OSw13tb-1jAxn3qVVfrV4zMvvfz5uQKF1sY__UGbGdhNd4UgMFhpFFDjYXpdnCkIaEAORFDo_lnFjahtRQzaqcI31ZUYpPi8YsEGdBBt0&c=QY5zd_8rr1G34S4mJnx_-yjORFnV-veQ4kSU9NWIjeh_iqteoBX7gQ==&ch=6KbXzg5_arTVnV47qD5UxQ8uyfeY9ByweGkdCH8B_f5C7xXCwJNszg==)

body:
True the Vote's Election Integrity Efforts Affirmed by Federal Court
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=358A848A20A3789)
---
| | Another Win for Georgia Voters
True the Vote's Election Integrity Efforts Affirmed by Federal Court

---
| | Friend -

True the Vote’s efforts to protect election integrity in Georgia’s U.S. Senate runoff elections [won](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3Rlcy1lbGVjdGlvbi1pbnRlZ3JpdHktZWZmb3J0cy1hZmZpcm1lZC1ieS1mZWRlcmFsLWNvdXJ0JTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=358A848A20A3802) another federal court battle last night, with District Court Judge Steve C. Jones ruling against Fair Fight’s request to stop True the Vote’s work that simply follows the procedure outlined in state law. This ruling follows a separate federal court ruling that allowed [elector challenges](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXBhcnRuZXJzLXdpdGgtZ2VvcmdpYW5zLWluLWV2ZXJ5LWNvdW50eS10by1wcmVlbXB0aXZlbHktY2hhbGxlbmdlLTM2NDU0MS1wb3RlbnRpYWxseS1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=358A848A20A3790) in Muscogee and Ben Hill counties to proceed.

These rulings affirm the truth that citizens play an important role in preserving election integrity by asking questions and challenging inaccuracies. Georgians owe a debt of gratitude to the registrars in Muscogee and Ben Hill counties who bravely told the court they’d discovered voters who had in fact moved out of state and were attempting to vote in this election – and would have if citizens had not submitted these challenges. And the Georgia citizens sued by Fair Fight were spending time with their families on Christmas Eve when they were served with court papers. They stood strong against these intimidation tactics and harassment.

---
| | [ LEARN MORE ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZjYXRlZ29yeSUyRnByZXNzLXJlbGVhc2VzJTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=358A848A20A3803)
---
| | True the Vote will continue its work in the Georgia elections, with additional hearings on voter eligibility scheduled.

Let the voters be heard. Let every legal, eligible voter have their vote counted. For this to happen, it is critical that those not eligible to vote are prevented from doing so. True the Vote – a completely citizen-led organization – exists for the purpose of championing voting rights, ensuring all law-abiding Americans have the tools they need to cast their ballot, and we are committed to that important work in Georgia and beyond.

To the legal Georgia voters who have not yet cast their ballots, your fellow Georgians are holding the line for you. Go vote Tuesday!
Thank you for being with us in this fight. Our work here in Georgia is only the beginning of our efforts nationwide to restore faith and confidence in our election system.

Onward!

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote Founder

clean_body: True the Vote's Election Integrity Efforts Affirmed by Federal Court | | | | | | Another Win for Georgia Voters True the Vote's Election Integrity Efforts Affirmed by Federal Court | | Friend - True the Vote’s efforts to protect election integrity in Georgia’s U.S. Senate runoff elections another federal court battle last night, with District Court Judge Steve C. Jones ruling against Fair Fight’s request to stop True the Vote’s work that simply follows the procedure outlined in state law. This ruling follows a separate federal court ruling that allowed in Muscogee and Ben Hill counties to proceed. These rulings affirm the truth that citizens play an important role in preserving election integrity by asking questions and challenging inaccuracies. Georgians owe a debt of gratitude to the registrars in Muscogee and Ben Hill counties who bravely told the court they’d discovered voters who had in fact moved out of state and were attempting to vote in this election – and would have if citizens had not submitted these challenges. And the Georgia citizens sued by Fair Fight were spending time with their families on Christmas Eve when they were served with court papers. They stood strong against these intimidation tactics and harassment. | | | | True the Vote will continue its work in the Georgia elections, with additional hearings on voter eligibility scheduled. Let the voters be heard. Let every legal, eligible voter have their vote counted. For this to happen, it is critical that those not eligible to vote are prevented from doing so. True the Vote – a completely citizen-led organization – exists for the purpose of championing voting rights, ensuring all law-abiding Americans have the tools they need to cast their ballot, and we are committed to that important work in Georgia and beyond. To the legal Georgia voters who have not yet cast their ballots, your fellow Georgians are holding the line for you. Go vote Tuesday! Thank you for being with us in this fight. Our work here in Georgia is only the beginning of our efforts nationwide to restore faith and confidence in our election system. body:

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 2, 2021
MEDIA CONTACTS Derek Dufresne, derek@rightvoter.com Adeline Sandridge, adeline.sandridge@gmail.com
Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (FL-03) Statement On Objecting To Electoral College Results Certification On January 6
"Free and fair elections are the cornerstone of our constitutional republic. Without an electoral process based on integrity and strict, secure standards, our republic is lost. Given my constitutional duty and the fact that thousands of sworn affidavits detailing specific election irregularities remain unresolved, I will object to the electoral college certification process on January 6.
The laws established by each State are paramount to our system of representational government. Under Article 2, Section 1, the Constitution declares, "each State shall appoint, in such manner, as the Legislature thereof may direct, a number of electors..." This ensures the people of each State have a voice in the process. However, if the laws passed by State legislatures are subverted by governors, then the requirements under the Constitution are not met and I have no choice but to object to their certification in the House.
Earlier in December, I led [a letter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qa7T581jUgbmI5MIos9qDOScdeH-BeIvFTBlAVXbAeVc66cUszuzZ1mPOBbo2Q7OhCrymm05kH8eifkKtyW_EsDw-z2Lhomjr5TJ5DEiq7gXhbsGTQzdn6A6-yoHz1X6DxdyzcyAq5LiSdXA1eOe3Dx--N8ouULLx190UR88DXFvVpcOhnTdhq_LnDms6CU2Hc5LB1sr4GM0kgjyVOidhw==&c=4Rr1RGrGdYOOfyO_zClOs7oGYtKpcrzwR8mZ4Ce-O9V234cu6rY6Pg==&ch=ijYJ9RUvqSU2LO0ODQP4TMzCLGmztGd5PGsKZRpCDC3mRoBiwB5t6w==), co-signed by dozens of my fellow Republican freshmen, to Speaker Pelosi urging her to support the integrity of the election process after November's general election revealed thousands of instances of fraud nationwide. Not only did these requests go ignored, but Speaker Pelosi has turned a blind eye to the glaring election irregularities in several states, from accepting absentee and mail-in ballots with unverified signatures to restrictions on bipartisan poll watchers to the blatant ignorance of state election laws. The importance of election security and integrity may be lost on the liberal left, but I will not stop fighting until we get to the bottom of the discrepancies that have affected our general election. This problem is a bipartisan one; doing nothing affects all Americans and our future elections for generations to come. We all deserve and expect free and fair elections. Guaranteeing this right is essential to protecting the future of our country and I will not sit idly by without an investigation into these fraudulent activities."
###
Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) will be the youngest Republican woman serving in the 117th Congress. She is a small business owner with grit, who grew up on a cattle ranch. She is a third-generation sandblaster, an alumnus of the United States Naval War College, and was the former Deputy Chief of Staff for Florida's 3rd Congressional District prior to her election.
Kat is married to her husband Matt, a Gainesville native, who is a Firefighter/Paramedic & SWAT Medic. Together, they co-founded a non-profit organization called "The Grit Foundation," whose mission is to support local law enforcement, veterans, and first responders.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 2, 2021 MEDIA CONTACTS Derek Dufresne, derek@rightvoter.com Adeline Sandridge, adeline.sandridge@gmail.com Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (FL-03) Statement On Objecting To Electoral College Results Certification On January 6 "Free and fair elections are the cornerstone of our constitutional republic. Without an electoral process based on integrity and strict, secure standards, our republic is lost. Given my constitutional duty and the fact that thousands of sworn affidavits detailing specific election irregularities remain unresolved, I will object to the electoral college certification process on January 6. The laws established by each State are paramount to our system of representational government. Under Article 2, Section 1, the Constitution declares, "each State shall appoint, in such manner, as the Legislature thereof may direct, a number of electors..." This ensures the people of each State have a voice in the process. However, if the laws passed by State legislatures are subverted by governors, then the requirements under the Constitution are not met and I have no choice but to object to their certification in the House. Earlier in December, I led ==, co-signed by dozens of my fellow Republican freshmen, to Speaker Pelosi urging her to support the integrity of the election process after November's general election revealed thousands of instances of fraud nationwide. Not only did these requests go ignored, but Speaker Pelosi has turned a blind eye to the glaring election irregularities in several states, from accepting absentee and mail-in ballots with unverified signatures to restrictions on bipartisan poll watchers to the blatant ignorance of state election laws. The importance of election security and integrity may be lost on the liberal left, but I will not stop fighting until we get to the bottom of the discrepancies that have affected our general election. This problem is a bipartisan one; doing nothing affects all Americans and our future elections for generations to come. We all deserve and expect free and fair elections. Guaranteeing this right is essential to protecting the future of our country and I will not sit idly by without an investigation into these fraudulent activities." Congresswoman-Elect Kat Cammack (R-FL-03) will be the youngest Republican woman serving in the 117th Congress. She is a small business owner with grit, who grew up on a cattle ranch. She is a third-generation sandblaster, an alumnus of the United States Naval War College, and was the former Deputy Chief of Staff for Florida's 3rd Congressional District prior to her election. Kat is married to her husband Matt, a Gainesville native, who is a Firefighter/Paramedic & SWAT Medic. Together, they co-founded a non-profit organization called "The Grit Foundation," whose mission is to support local law enforcement, veterans, and first responders. | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

| | Friend - **There are only THREE days left until the end of the January 5 runoff elections for the U.S. Senate and Public Service Commission in Georgia!** If you requested a mail ballot and have not returned it, NOW is the time to do so! **Mail ballots must be received by your county before 7pm on Tuesday, January 5!** If you have your mail ballot, follow the instructions and complete it now. Remember to sign the oath on the back of the envelope! Then, check [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30a/34a064cc/1d186a5d/7027d91/4115804935/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate") to find a drop box location in your county; you can also return your ballot directly to your county elections office if your county does not have a drop box available. Once you return your ballot, go to [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30a/34a064cc/1d186a5d/7027d9e/4115804935/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") to check when your ballot gets received. **Requested a ballot but haven 't received it?** You can vote in person on Election Day! Just tell the person at the check-in table that you wish to cancel your requested ballot and vote in person. With just three days left to make your voice heard, it's crucial that you drop off your ballot now or make a plan to vote in person on January 5. YOU have the power to help choose Georgia's next U.S. Senators and Public Service Commissioner. COVID-19 relief, racial and climate justice, affordable healthcare, and small businesses are all on the ballot. Grab a friend or family member and head to the polls or a drop box in your county to help decide Georgia's future. After you vote, [tell us about your voting experience](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa30a/34a064cc/1d186a5d/7027d9f/4115804935/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform")! | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, JANUARY 2, 2021
PHOTO RELEASE: KELLY LOEFFLER MAKES CAMPAIGN STOPS ACROSS THE STATE
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler criss-crossed the state for five campaign stops to encourage folks to make a plan to vote. She kicked off the morning with Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX) in Cumming before heading over to Jefferson and then Loganville, where she had a great time knocking doors. Later, Senator Loeffler made her way to Carrollton for another stop before closing out the day in Peachtree City. All of these events, part of Senator Loeffler's Senate Firewall Tour, drew dozens of supporters who are fired up to save America.
